required.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
required.description: Supabase service-role key (sb_secret_ format). Server-only — never NEXT_PUBLIC_.

required.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
required.description: ElevenLabs operator API key. Server-only — never NEXT_PUBLIC_. Used in /api/voice/elevenlabs-connect.

required.name: ELEVENLABS_WEBHOOK_SECRET
required.description: HMAC secret captured at webhook creation in ElevenLabs dashboard. Required for VMS rule 10 verification on all 6 voice webhooks.

optional.name: ELEVENLABS_AGENT_SETUP
optional.description: ElevenLabs agent ID for the setup voice agent

optional.name: ELEVENLABS_AGENT_BASICS
optional.description: ElevenLabs agent ID for opportunity basics

optional.name: ELEVENLABS_AGENT_PROPERTY
optional.description: ElevenLabs agent ID for property details

optional.name: ELEVENLABS_AGENT_FINANCIAL
optional.description: ElevenLabs agent ID for financial details

optional.name: ELEVENLABS_AGENT_DERISK
optional.description: ElevenLabs agent ID for de-risk checklist

optional.name: ELEVENLABS_AGENT_ASSESSMENT
optional.description: ElevenLabs agent ID for assessment discussion

optional.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN
optional.description: Mapbox public token for address autocomplete

optional.name: RESEND_FROM_EMAIL
optional.description: Transactional email sender. Must be noreply@updates.corporateaisolutions.com (R6).

optional.name: PLATFORM_TRUST_PROJECT_ID
optional.description: Platform Trust project identifier — no hardcoded fallback

external_services.name: ElevenLabs ConvAI
external_services.purpose: Voice agent sessions for deal data collection and assessment discussion

external_services.name: Mapbox
external_services.purpose: Address autocomplete on opportunity creation forms

known_gaps.description: QA test accounts cannot be provisioned — SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY must be updated to sb_secret_ format in Vercel env
known_gaps.resolution: Operator config: update env var in Vercel dashboard
